name: safe-disk-transfer
description: Aplicacao local para verificar saude de discos e mover arquivos com validacao por hash.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run preview -- --host 0.0.0.0"
